media-validator.description: Validate media files (MP4, PNG, TXT) via OCR/metadata/pattern matching for PASS/FAIL with evidence (§11.4.164)

open-design.description: OpenDesign MCP server for UI design system (§11.4.162). Requires OD daemon running on localhost:7456.

semgrep.description: Semgrep static-analysis MCP server (§11.4.166). Local AST/scan/findings over the workspace; uses Community registry rules when SEMGREP_APP_TOKEN is absent (Pro/app tier honestly skipped per §11.4.3).
